glosses.ja: オペラ; オペラ劇場

sentences.target: On va à l’opéra ce soir.

translations.fr: On va à l’opéra ce soir.
translations.en: We’re going to the opera tonight.
translations.es: Vamos a la ópera esta noche.
translations.de: Wir gehen heute Abend in die Oper.
translations.ru: Мы сегодня вечером идём в оперу.
translations.pt: Vamos à ópera hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi đi xem opera.
translations.nl: We gaan vanavond naar de opera.
translations.uk: Ми сьогодні ввечері йдемо в оперу.
translations.hi: हम आज रात ओपेरा देखने जा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi skal på opera i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kami pergi ke opera.
translations.sv: Vi ska gå på opera i kväll.
translations.da: Vi skal i operaen i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜オペラに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal ‘on’, often used for ‘we’); triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘aller’; predicates the motion/plan.
Preposition introducing a destination/location complement.
Definite article, elided before vowel sound; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘soir’ in the time expression.
Common noun; functions as a temporal complement (‘this evening’).

translations.en: I’m waiting in front of the opera with you.
translations.es: Espero contigo frente a la ópera.
translations.de: Ich warte mit dir vor der Oper.
translations.ko: 오페라 앞에서 너와 함께 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在歌剧院前和你一起等着。
translations.yue: 我喺歌劇院門口同你一齊等。
translations.ru: Я жду вместе с тобой перед оперным театром.
translations.pt: Estou esperando com você em frente à ópera.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi cùng bạn trước nhà hát opera.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر معك أمام دار الأوبرا.
translations.nl: Ik wacht samen met jou voor de opera.
translations.uk: Я чекаю разом з тобою перед оперним театром.
translations.hu: Veled együtt várok az operaház előtt.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे साथ ओपेरा के सामने इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω μαζί σου μπροστά από την όπερα.
translations.nb: Jeg venter sammen med deg foran operaen.
translations.id: Aku menunggu bersamamu di depan gedung opera.
translations.sv: Jag väntar med dig framför operan.
translations.ro: Aștept împreună cu tine în fața operei.
translations.da: Jeg venter sammen med dig foran operaen.
translations.ja: オペラ座の前であなたと一緒に待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic, elided before vowel; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, elided before vowel sound; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘devant’.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Stressed 2nd person singular pronoun; object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Cet opéra commence à dix-neuf heures.

translations.fr: Cet opéra commence à dix-neuf heures.
translations.en: This opera starts at seven p.m.
translations.es: Esta ópera comienza a las siete de la tarde.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部歌剧在晚上七点开始。
translations.yue: 呢齣歌劇喺晚上七點開始。
translations.ru: Эта опера начинается в семь вечера.
translations.he: האופרה הזאת מתחילה בשעה שבע בערב.
translations.vi: Vở opera này bắt đầu lúc 7 giờ tối.
translations.ar: هذه الأوبرا تبدأ الساعة السابعة مساءً.
translations.nl: Deze opera begint om zeven uur 's avonds.
translations.uk: Ця опера починається о сьомій вечора.
translations.hu: Ez az opera este hétkor kezdődik.
translations.hi: यह ओपेरा शाम सात बजे शुरू होता है।
translations.pl: Ta opera zaczyna się o siódmej wieczorem.
translations.el: Αυτή η όπερα ξεκινά στις επτά το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Denne operaen starter klokken sju om kvelden.
translations.id: Opera ini mulai pukul tujuh malam.
translations.sv: Den här operan börjar klockan sju på kvällen.
translations.ro: Această operă începe la ora șapte seara.
translations.cs: Tato opera začíná v sedm večer.
translations.da: Denne opera starter klokken syv om aftenen.
translations.fi: Tämä ooppera alkaa kello seitsemältä illalla.
translations.ja: このオペラは午後7時に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form used before vowel/h muet; modifies ‘opéra’.
Common noun; subject of the verb ‘commence’.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a time expression.
Cardinal numeral; part of the clock-time expression.
Common noun, plural; in time-telling means ‘o’clock’ (‘19:00’).

sentences.target: Tu préfères l’opéra ou le théâtre.

translations.fr: Tu préfères l’opéra ou le théâtre.
translations.en: Do you prefer opera or theater.
translations.de: Magst du lieber Oper oder Theater?
translations.ko: 오페라와 연극 중에 어느 쪽을 더 좋아요?
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢歌剧还是话剧？
translations.yue: 你鍾意歌劇定係戲劇多啲？
translations.tr: Operayı mı yoksa tiyatroyu mu tercih ediyorsun?
translations.vi: Bạn thích opera hay kịch hơn?
translations.nl: Geef je de voorkeur aan opera of theater?
translations.uk: Ти віддаєш перевагу опері чи театру?
translations.hu: Az operát vagy a színházat szereted jobban?
translations.hi: तुम ओपेरा या थियेटर किसे ज्यादा पसंद करते हो?
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka opera atau teater?
translations.ja: オペラと演劇ではどちらが好きですか？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of ‘préfères’.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes coordinated direct objects.
Definite article, elided before vowel sound; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun; direct object of ‘préfères’ (first conjunct).
Coordinating conjunction linking two noun phrases.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘théâtre’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘préfères’ (second conjunct).

Tu préfères l’opéra ou le théâtre.

Tu préfères l’opéra ou le théâtre.
en: We’re going to the opera tonight.
I’m waiting in front of the opera with you.
This opera starts at seven p.m.
Do you prefer opera or theater.
